name: Chicken Romano
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil until cooked through.
2. Remove and set aside to drain excess fat.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Add onion and return chicken to pot. Cover and cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in chili sauce and dried oregano.
6. Cook uncovered for an additional 10 minutes, basting frequently.
7. Skim any excess fat from the surface of the sauce.
8. Serve hot over chicken, sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese.
